arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Cardiff City: Premier League side looking to extend Bluebirds' dismal FA Cup streak
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to extend a dismal FA Cup record held by Cardiff City when the teams meet in the fifth round on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Cardiff Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Cardiff kick off the fifth round of the FA Cup when they face off at Villa Park tonight. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Cardiff: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Aston Villa are aiming to reach the FA Cup quarter-finals for the first time in a decade when they host Championship outfit Cardiff City on Friday night. Aaron Ramsey should feature having represented Arsenal in the 2014/15 FA Cup final win over the Villans, while ex-Villa players Anwar El Ghazi and Calum Chambers will have the opportunity to return to the West Midlands.

arts.ttl: Rashford up for permanent Villa move - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is prepared to make his Aston Villa loan move permanent, while Liverpool have a growing interest in Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Cardiff – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa host Cardiff City as the FA Cup’s fifth round gets underway this evening. Unai Emery is aiming for silverware in his second full season at the helm, following encouraging progress at Villa Park. The Villans have reached round five of the FA Cup for the first time in a decade. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford told Man Utd will hate what he's about to do at Aston Villa amid £40m clause
arts.sum: And Yorke, who famously swapped Villa for United and won the treble at Old Trafford under Sir Alex Ferguson in 1999, believes Rashford is only going to get better between now and the end of the season as Villa battle on three fronts in the Premier League, Champions League and FA Cup - and he thinks the Red Devils won't like that one bit. Rashford has impressed since joining Villa from Manchester United on loan amid a £40m clause to make his transfer permanent

Unai Emery has overseen huge progress in the Midlands, with last season’s Champions League qualification a statement achievement. arts.ttl: Unai Emery fires Aston Villa warning with 'invincible' reality check
arts.sum: Unai Emery suggests complacency has been a factor in Aston Villa's stop-start league campaign after his side missed the opportunity to move into the top five on Tuesday night, losing 4-1 to Crystal Palace. Unai Emery fires Aston Villa warning with 'invincible' reality check

arts.ttl: Man United forward Marcus Rashford 'performs U-turn' on Barcelona transfer wish
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford is reportedly determined to complete a permanent move to Aston Villa at the end of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa’s Kirsty Hanson: ‘Dementia impacts so many people. It’s nice to connect with fans on a deeper level’
arts.sum: The forward talks about her 1km a day challenge for Dementia UK after her grandmother was diagnosed and how it has allowed her to slow down and think about life Hugo is excited. He has not been out for a walk yet and is joining the on-the-go interview with his owner, the Aston Villa forward Kirsty Hanson. We are strolling around the park near the 26-year-old’s house. Hugo may be bouncing, and greeting as many dogs as he can, but our starting topic is less joyful. I have joined Hanson on a particularly crisp day in the Midlands as she takes part in Dementia UK’s Walk 1k a Day in February challenge. Hanson’s reason for taking part in the campaign was explained in three words on social media as she promoted her participation: “For my Gran.” “My granny was diagnosed in 2022,” says Hanson, as we veer off a path and on to the grass. “I thought it was such a good issue to campaign for. I also thought it would be good for my family. Continue reading...
